text.title: Reporting Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Reporting Basics methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-kpis
step.action: Select 3-7 actionable KPIs; reject vanity metrics.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.action: Set thresholds per KPI; document rationale.

step.name: draft-narrative
step.action: Write 3-5 line narrative summarising state + breaches + next-step.

step.name: flag-escalations
step.action: For each breach emit escalation_flag with owner + proposed action.

step.name: publish-on-cadence
step.action: Publish to named distribution list on locked cadence.
